svg.title: Motor sync flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing RC input ramping to a target velocity, feeding into two parallel PID loops with a cross-coupling sync error, each driving a motor with encoder feedback.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RC ramp work?')
sendPrompt('What is the target velocity node?')
sendPrompt('How is the sync error calculated?')
sendPrompt('Explain the PID loop for Motor A')
sendPrompt('Explain the PID loop for Motor B')
